title: Achọpụtara Mmanụ n'Ogoniland
body: Shell-BP malitere ịwepụ mmanụ n'Ogoniland. Nar Ogoni ahụghị ego ọ bụla site n'ọrụ ahụ. Ibiribiri gburugburu ebe obibi malitere ozugbo ma na-abawanye n'ọtụtụ ọchịchọ ndị na-esote.

title: A Tọrọ MOSOP Ntọala — Ogoni Bill of Rights
body: Ken Saro-Wiwa sonyere nar ọzọ tọrọ ntọala nke Movement for the Survival of the Ogoni People (MOSOP). E nyere gọọmentị Nigeria na mba ụwa Ogoni Bill of Rights, nke chọọ ikike ọchịchọ, ikpochapụ gburugburu ebe obibi, na nkesa ego mmanụ.

title: Ogoni Day — Nar 300,000 Gara Ngagharị Iwe
body: N'ọnwa January 4, ihe dị ka nar Ogoni 300,000 gara ngagharị iwe nke udo nke a maara dị ka Ogoni Day — otu n'ime ngagharị iwe ndị kachasị nnukwu a hazie n'akụkọ ihe mere eme Nigeria. Shell weputara nar ya n'Ogoniland. Gọọmentị ndị agha Nigeria zia Rivers State Internal Security Task Force.

title: Ọchịchọ Ndị Agha Na-eme Ihe Ike n'Ogoniland
body: Task Force nke Lt Col Paul Okuntimo mere nzọrọ, gbuchie mmadụ, na mee mwakpo ikike mmadụ n'ụmụ obodo Ogoni. A gburu nar Ogoni narị ọtụtụ. A tụfuru Ken Saro-Wiwa ma wepụta ya n'oge dị mkpirikpi.

title: A Tụfuru Ha Mgbe Nar Giokoo Gburu Nar Isi
body: N'ọnwa May 21, 1994, a gburu nar isi Ogoni anọ n'nzukọ pro-gọọmentị na Giokoo. A tụfuo Ken Saro-Wiwa, nke adighi ebe ahụ, ya na nar isi MOSOP asatọ ọzọ. A bụọkwa ha nile ntụpọ ịkọ igbu mmadụ. Ndị otu ikike mmadụ jụọ ajụjụ n'ebubo ahụ ozugbo.

title: Ikpe Ụlọ Ọchịchọ nẹ Igbu Ha
body: Ụlọ ikpe nke gọọmentị ndị agha họọrọ mere ikpe n'nar biakporum. E machibidoro ndị agbẹjọrọ. Onye ọ bụ isi na-akọ ihe maka ọchịchọ mechara laghachi azụ ụbọchị ọzọ, na-ekwu na e tụrụ ya ego. Mba ụwa chọrọ ka e kwụsị igbu ha. N'ọnwa Nọvemba 10, 1995, a gbuchiere Ken Saro-Wiwa, Saturday Dobee, Nordu Eawo, Daniel Gbooko, Paul Levura, Felix Nuate, Baribor Bera, Barinem Kiobel, nẹ John Kpuinen site n'ile ha n'ụlọ mkpọrọ Port Harcourt.

title: Nzaghachi Mba Ụwa — E Kpụsaa Nigeria n'Commonwealth
body: E kpụsaa Nigeria n'otu Commonwealth of Nations. United States, European Union, na gọọmentị ọtụtụ tọrọ ntọala ihe ntaramahụhụ ma ọ bụ kọwaa ihe ha na-echegbu ha. Shell tụlere nkatọ mba ụwa siri ike maka mmekọrịta ya n'omume gọọmentị Nigeria.

title: Ọnwụ Sani Abacha
body: Onye ọchịchọ ndị agha Sani Abacha nwụọ n'ọrụ. Ntụgharị onwe ya na-amalite na Nigeria. Okwu banyere nar Ogoni Biakporum bụrụ isi ihe a na-ekwu banyere nnọchiteanya ụlọ ọrụ, ikpe ziri ezi gburugburu ebe obibi, na ikike nar mba obere n'okpuru ọchịchọ ndị agha.

title: Shell Kwụọ Ụgwọ — Wiwa v. Royal Dutch Shell
body: Shell kwere na ha ga-akwụ $15.5 nde dollar iji kwụchaa ikpe ezinụlọ nke Ken Saro-Wiwa na nar ọzọ tọrọ n'United States. Shell jụọ na ha mere ihe ọjọọ. Nkwụọ ụgwọ ahụ naghị etinye nnabata nke mmetụ ike.

title: Akwụkwọ UNEP Banyere Ogoniland
body: United Nations Environment Programme bipụtara akwụkwọ ya dị mkpa banyere Ogoniland, na-akọwa ibiribiri mmanụ nke metụtara ala, mmiri, na ikuku n'ebe ahụ. O tụrọ ntọala ego ikpochapụ nke $1 nde dollar ma kwuo na ikpochapụ gburugburu ebe obibi zuru oke nwere ike iwe afọ 25–30.

title: E Malite HYPREP
body: Gọọmentị Nigeria malitere Hydrocarbon Pollution Remediation Project (HYPREP) iji malite mmejuputa nke ihe UNEP tụrọ ntọala. E tọrọ ntọala ọganiihu ya dị oge. Nar obodo Ogoni na-echefu na ala na mmiri nke mesiri ike.

title: Onye Isi Ala Tinubu Nyere Ha Nkwenye Ngọzi Nke Oge A Gasịrị
body: Onye isi ala Nigeria Bola Ahmed Tinubu nyere Ken Saro-Wiwa na nar ọchịchọ asatọ ndị ọzọ a gbuchie ha nkwenye ngọzi nke oge a gasịrị. Ezinụlọ Saro-Wiwa na nar na-akwado ha nabatara nnọchi anya ya dị mma ma na-achọ ntọpụta iwu zuru oke na nnọchi anya nke ọha na eze maka ibiribiri Ogoniland.
